title: Arsenal 'legend' Mead to leave club at end of season
summary: Arsenal forward Beth Mead is departing the club at season's end following a distinguished career. Arsenal have recognized her as a "legend" in their official announcement, marking the end of an era for the English international.
content: Arsenal describe forward Beth Mead as a "legend of the club" as they announce she is to leave at the end of the season.

zh.title: 阿森纳"传奇人物"米德赛季末离队
zh.summary: 阿森纳前锋贝思·米德在经历杰出职业生涯后将在赛季末离开俱乐部。阿森纳在官方声明中将她列为"传奇人物"，标志着这位英格兰国脚职业生涯的一个时代结束。

title: Liverpool release images of planned Jota memorial
summary: Liverpool is unveiling a memorial to late forward Diogo Jota and his brother Andre Silva, who passed away last summer. The memorial images have been released to honor their memory and legacy.
content: Liverpool release images of a planned memorial to late forward Diogo Jota and his brother Andre Silva, following their deaths last summer.

zh.title: 利物浦发布计划中的若塔纪念碑图片
zh.summary: 利物浦正在为已故前锋迪奥戈·若塔及其兄弟安德烈·席尔瓦揭幕纪念碑，他们于去年夏天去世。纪念碑图片已发布，以纪念他们的记忆和遗产。

title: What is it like for players in a title race?
summary: Former Celtic defender Darren O'Dea and Motherwell midfielder Andy Halliday discuss the psychological and tactical intensity of competing in a close title race. They share insights into both the on-field pressure and dressing room atmosphere during high-stakes competition.

zh.title: 参加争冠的球员是什么感受？

title: Newcastle's Burn on mental health and importance of asking for help
summary: Newcastle United Foundation painted benches in Leazes Park to promote mental health awareness in the community. Defender Dan Burn discusses the initiative and emphasizes the importance of checking in on others and seeking support.
content:
Newcastle United Foundation has painted benches in the city's Leazes Park to highlight mental health and encourage fans to talk to each other.
Defender Dan Burn spoke to BBC Sport about the work being done and how important it is to "check in".

title: Therapy worked for me, says Newcastle defender Burn
summary: Newcastle defender Dan Burn shares that therapy has been effective for him personally and encourages those struggling with mental health issues to seek professional support. His advocacy aims to reduce stigma around mental health in football.
content: Newcastle United defender Dan Burn says therapy worked "quite well" for him as he urges those struggling with their mental health to seek help.

zh.title: 纽卡斯尔后卫伯恩说心理治疗对他有效
zh.summary: 纽卡斯尔后卫丹·伯恩分享称心理治疗对他个人很有效，他鼓励与心理健康问题作斗争的人寻求专业支持。他的倡议旨在减少足球界对心理健康的污名化。

title: Rochdale's Wembley win triggers more three-up calls
summary: Following Rochdale's Wembley victory, National League officials are renewing calls for an increase from two to three promotion places to the English Football League. The proposal aims to provide more opportunities for ambitious lower-league clubs.
content: National League chiefs renew their call for three promotion places to the EFL after Rochdale's victory at Wembley.

title: Arteta: 'Brave' VAR call could alter Arsenal histo...

The officials' call is being questioned for consistency in refereeing standards. This controversial decision adds to West Ham's struggles in the relegation battle.
content: West Ham captain Jarrod Bowen and manager Nuno Espirito Santo have both hit out at the officials following the late disallowed goal against Arsenal, questioning refereeing consistency.

title: 'Tough day:' Flick mourns dad as Barça win LaLiga

The emotional win over the club's rivals was bittersweet for the coach dealing with personal tragedy. Flick's composure under difficult circumstances garnered sympathy from the sporting world.
content: Barcelona coach Hansi Flick said it had been a "tough day" after guiding his team to the LaLiga title against Real Madrid just hours after learning of the death of his father.

title: Berhalter brushes off WC roster reveal 'pressure'
